analysis.reasoning: Core message: A neutral congratulatory note on International Peace Day, emphasizing that both Russia and Cambodia know the value of peace and expressing hope that younger generations enjoy peacetime. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no mention of the West or hostility. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – not present; no reference to multipolarity, BRICS, or non-Western system-building. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – partially relevant: the tweet portrays Russia positively in a peace-oriented light and associates it with Cambodia in a friendly, solidarity tone, implying Russia values and promotes peace. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – not referenced. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally) – not referenced. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3 by framing Russia as peace-valuing and a friendly partner, albeit subtly.
